creator: ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
text:
This patch updates devel/simgear to v1.9.0.

As simgear and flightgear are tightly bound, please commit this patch along with the updates of :

- games/flighgear-aircrafts (see ports/129884)
- games/fgfs-base -> games/flightgear-data v1.9.0
- games/flightgear v1.9.0

I will submit other PRs for the last two ports.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
